name: Multi-Color Flow Cytometry Surface & Intracellular Staining
nameCn: 多色流式细胞术（表面 + 胞内蛋白染色）

components.name: 1. Prepare single-cell suspension; count and adjust to 2–5×10⁶/mL

note.en: Dissociate tissue with gentleMACS or collagenase/trypsin. Pellet: 400×g 5 min. Resuspend in FACS buffer (facs_buffer). Aliquot 100 µL (2–5×10⁵ cells) per staining tube.
note.zh: 组织用 gentleMACS 或胶原酶/胰酶解离。400×g 5 min 沉淀。FACS 缓冲液重悬。每管分 100 µL（2–5×10⁵ 细胞）。

components.name: 2. Fc block: add anti-FcγIII/II receptor (BD Fc Block, 5 µg/mL), 15 min, 4°C

note.en: Prevents non-specific binding of antibodies to Fc receptors on monocytes/macrophages/NK cells. For human cells: CD16/CD32 block. For mouse: 2.4G2 clone. Omit for epithelial/cancer cell lines.
note.zh: 防止单核细胞/巨噬细胞/NK 细胞 Fc 受体非特异性结合。人细胞：CD16/CD32 封闭。小鼠：2.4G2 克隆。上皮/肿瘤细胞系可省略。

components.name: 3. Viability dye staining: add Live/Dead dye (DAPI 1 µg/mL or Zombie dye), 15–30 min, RT or 4°C

note.en: Must stain before surface antibodies (in PBS only — no serum/BSA). DAPI (UV), 7-AAD (PE channel), Live/Dead Aqua (DAPI channel), Zombie dyes (various). Dead cells = high staining.
note.zh: 必须在表面抗体染色前进行（仅用 PBS——不含血清/BSA）。DAPI（UV 激发）、7-AAD（PE 通道）、Live/Dead Aqua（DAPI 通道）、Zombie 染料（多种）。死细胞染色强。

components.name: 4. Surface antibody staining: add antibody cocktail in FACS buffer (50–100 µL/tube), 20–30 min, 4°C, dark

note.en: Pre-titrate each antibody (typical: 0.1–1 µg/mL). Keep cold throughout. Label/mark tubes. Prepare single-color controls and FMO (fluorescence minus one) controls.
note.zh: 每种抗体需预先滴定（通常 0.1–1 µg/mL）。全程保持冷冻。准备单色对照和 FMO（少一荧光）对照。

components.name: 5. Wash 2×: add 3 mL FACS buffer; 400×g 5 min 4°C; decant; repeat

note.en: Decant briskly or aspirate. Do not disrupt pellet. Residual wash is OK.
note.zh: 快速倾倒或抽吸。勿破坏沉淀。少量残余洗液无影响。

components.name: 6. For surface-only panel: fix in 100 µL 1–4% PFA, 20 min RT, wash 2×

note.en: Skip fixation if: (a) running live cells, (b) calcium flux assay, (c) sorting for downstream culture. Fixed cells: stable ≥48 h at 4°C in dark.
note.zh: 如需活细胞（钙流、分选后培养）则跳过固定。固定细胞：4°C 避光稳定 ≥48 h。

components.name: 7. Intracellular staining (if needed): fix+permeabilize with Cytofix/Cytoperm or FoxP3 buffer set

note.en: Cytofix/Cytoperm (BD): 4°C 20 min, wash 2× in Perm/Wash, then add intracellular Ab (cytokines, Ki67) in Perm/Wash, 30 min 4°C. For transcription factors (FoxP3, T-bet): FoxP3/Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set (eBioscience), 4°C overnight.
note.zh: Cytofix/Cytoperm（BD）：4°C 20 min，Perm/Wash 洗 2 次，胞内抗体（细胞因子、Ki67）加入 Perm/Wash，4°C 30 min。转录因子（FoxP3、T-bet）：FoxP3/转录因子染色缓冲液套装（eBioscience），4°C 过夜。

components.name: 8. Final wash: 2× FACS buffer; resuspend in 200–500 µL FACS buffer; run on cytometer

note.en: Run within 4 h for best results. Acquire ≥10,000 cells (lymphocytes) or 50,000 events in gate of interest. Set voltages using unstained controls.
note.zh: 4 h 内上机效果最佳。采集 ≥10,000 个细胞（淋巴细胞）或门内 ≥50,000 个事件。用无染色对照设置电压。

notes.en: Panel design rules: (1) brightest fluorochrome (PE, APC) for lowest-expression markers; (2) avoid spectral overlap of similar channels; (3) tandem dyes degrade (use fresh, avoid freeze-thaw). Compensation: required for all multicolor panels. Use UltraComp eBeads or anti-mouse Igκ beads for compensation controls. Analysis: FlowJo, FCS Express, Cytobank.
notes.zh: 面板设计原则：(1) 最亮荧光素（PE、APC）用于低表达标记；(2) 避免相邻通道光谱重叠；(3) 串联染料易降解（新鲜使用，避免冻融）。补偿校正：多色面板必须做。用 UltraComp eBeads 或抗小鼠 Igκ 磁珠做补偿对照。分析软件：FlowJo、FCS Express、Cytobank。

ref: Mahnke & Roederer (2007) Clin Lab Med 27:469–485; Chattopadhyay et al. (2014) Nat Protoc 9:147–154; Cossarizza et al. (2021) Eur J Immunol 51:2708
